Spring Data MongoDB - Core
  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index.Index

Packages that use Index
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index
Support for MongoDB document indexing.

  • Uses of Index in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index

    Subclasses of Index in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CompoundIndexDefinition
    Index definition to span multiple keys.
    class 
    WildcardIndex
    WildcardIndex is a specific Index that can be used to include all fields into an index based on the $**" : 1 pattern on a root object (the one typically carrying the Document annotation).
    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index that return Index
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Index
    Index.background()
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 5.0 for removal without replacement.
    Index
    Index.collation(@Nullable Collation collation)
    Set the Collation to specify language-specific rules for string comparison, such as rules for lettercase and accent marks.
    NOTE: Only queries using the same Collation as the Index actually make use of the index.
    Index
    Index.expire(long value)
    Specifies TTL in seconds.
    Index
    Index.expire(long value, TimeUnit unit)
    Specifies TTL with given TimeUnit.
    Index
    Index.expire(Duration timeout)
    Specifies the TTL.
    Index
    WildcardIndex.expire(long seconds)
    ttl option is not supported.
    Index
    WildcardIndex.expire(long value, TimeUnit timeUnit)
    ttl option is not supported.
    Index
    WildcardIndex.expire(Duration duration)
    ttl option is not supported.
    Index
    Index.hidden()
    Hidden indexes are not visible to the query planner and cannot be used to support a query.
    Index
    Index.named(String name)
     
    Index
    Index.on(String key, Sort.Direction direction)
     
    <T,P> Index
    Index.on(TypedPropertyPath<T,P> property, Sort.Direction direction)
    Append the path to the target property to the index definition.
    Index
    Index.partial(@Nullable IndexFilter filter)
    Only index the documents in a collection that meet a specified filter expression.
    Index
    Index.sparse()
    Skip over any document that is missing the indexed field.
    Index
    Index.unique()
    Reject all documents that contain a duplicate value for the indexed field.
    Index
    WildcardIndex.unique()
    Unique option is not supported.
